description: Commit the restructured directory and merge feat/self-evolving-kernel into main locally.
steps: Step 1: Stage all changes with 'git add -A' (this includes moved/deleted files).
Step 2: Commit with message: 'refactor: consolidate all skills into skills/ directory'
Step 3: Checkout main branch: 'git checkout main'
Step 4: Merge feat/self-evolving-kernel into main: 'git merge feat/self-evolving-kernel --no-ff -m "Merge feat/self-evolving-kernel: Self-Evolving AI Development Kernel"'
Step 5: Verify tests still pass on main: 'python -m pytest tests/ -q'
acceptance_criteria: Commit exists on feat/self-evolving-kernel with the refactor message
Current branch is main after the merge
Main contains the merge commit with all the restructured code
All 894 tests pass on main branch
verification: Run 'git log --oneline -3' to confirm merge commit exists
Run 'git branch --show-current' confirms we are on main
Run 'python -m pytest tests/ -q' passes all 894 tests on main
findings: Merge had add/add conflicts in 25 files due to divergent histories between main and feat/self-evolving-kernel. Resolved all by taking theirs (feature branch) since it contains the latest and most complete code including the skills directory reorganization. All 894 tests pass on main after the merge.
